output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?membraneLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q211648 wdt:P361 ?membrane .
  ?membrane rdfs:label ?membraneLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?membraneLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(regex(?membraneLabel , 'mucosa' , 'i'))
}
output.formatted:
mucosa

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?membraneLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q211648 wdt:P361 ?membrane .
  ?membrane rdfs:label ?membraneLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?membraneLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(regex(?membraneLabel , 'mucosa' , 'i'))
}
```
